zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hill於1654年12月1日出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆時，他的父親John Hills30歲，母親Mrs Rebeckah Hills30歲。他於1673年與Mrs. Alice Hills在英國英格蘭艾可分興費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1719年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾索韓姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hill于1654年12月1日出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆时，他的父亲John Hills30岁，母亲Mrs Rebeckah Hills30岁。他于1673年与Mrs. Alice Hills在英国英格兰艾可分興費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1719年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾索韓姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hill was born on 1 December 1654, in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hills, was 30 and his mother, Mrs Rebeckah Hills, was 30. He married Mrs. Alice Hills in 1673, in Finchingfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1719, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hill est né le 1 décembre 1654, à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hills, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs Rebeckah Hills, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Alice Hills en 1673, à Finchingfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1719, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Soham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hill am 1. Dezember 1654 in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hills 30 und seine Mutter Mrs Rebeckah Hills 30. Er hat 1673 in Finchingfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Alice Hills geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1719 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Soham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hill è nato il il 1 dicembre 1654 nel Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hills, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Rebeckah Hills, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Alice Hills nel 1673, nel Finchingfield, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1719, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hillが1654年12月1日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムで生まれた時，父John Hillsは30歳，母Mrs Rebeckah Hillsは30歳であった。1673年にイギリスイギリスエセックスフィンチングフィールドでMrs. Alice Hillsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1719年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hill(이)가 1654년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hills(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Rebeckah Hills(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1673년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑친그필드에서 Mrs. Alice Hills(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1719년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 소함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hill nasceu em 1 de dezembro de 1654, em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hills, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Rebeckah Hills, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Alice Hills em 1673, em Finchingfield, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1719, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hill родился 1 декабря 1654 г. в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hills было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Rebeckah Hills, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Alice Hills в 1673 г. в местности финчингфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1719 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности сохам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hill nació el 1 de diciembre de 1654, en Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hills, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs Rebeckah Hills, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mrs. Alice Hills en 1673, en Finchingfield, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1719, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Soham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
